item.title: Network People Services Technologies Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 980
item.description: Network People Services Technologies Ltd has reached a new 52-week low, closing at Rs.980 on 12 Mar 2026. The stock has experienced a notable decline amid broader market pressures and sector underperformance, marking a significant price level not seen in the past year. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Accuracy Shipping Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.3.9 Amidst Weak Financial Metrics
item.description: Accuracy Shipping Ltd’s stock declined sharply to a new 52-week and all-time low of Rs.3.9 today, reflecting ongoing financial pressures and subdued market sentiment within the transport services sector. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Piramal Pharma Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low Amidst Continued Downtrend
item.description: Piramal Pharma Ltd’s shares have declined to a fresh 52-week low, closing near Rs 144.85 on 12 Mar 2026, marking a significant milestone in the stock’s ongoing downward trajectory. This new low price reflects a 1.62% proximity to the absolute 52-week low of Rs 142.95, underscoring persistent pressures on the company’s valuation within the Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: DRC Systems India Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amid Market Downturn
item.description: Shares of DRC Systems India Ltd have declined to a fresh 52-week low, reflecting ongoing pressures within the Computers - Software & Consulting sector. The stock’s latest low price marks a significant point in its recent performance trajectory amid broader market weakness. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Williamson Magor & Company Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low Amidst Market Downturn
item.description: Williamson Magor & Company Ltd’s shares have declined to a fresh 52-week low, closing near Rs 25.48, marking a significant milestone in the stock’s ongoing downward trajectory. The stock’s performance reflects persistent pressures within the Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC) sector and broader market headwinds. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: SRF Ltd. Stock Falls to 52-Week Low Amid Mixed Financial Signals
item.description: SRF Ltd., a key player in the Specialty Chemicals sector, has touched a new 52-week low, reflecting ongoing pressures in the market and sector-wide declines. The stock’s latest low price marks a significant point in its recent performance trajectory. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Country Club Hospitality & Holidays Ltd Hits 52-Week Low Amidst Weak Fundamentals
item.description: Shares of Country Club Hospitality & Holidays Ltd have declined to a fresh 52-week low, reflecting ongoing financial pressures and subdued market performance. The stock’s new low price underscores the challenges faced by the company within the Hotels & Resorts sector amid a broadly declining market environment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Patel Integrated Logistics Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amidst Continued Downtrend
item.description: Patel Integrated Logistics Ltd has declined to a fresh 52-week low, reflecting ongoing pressures within the transport services sector. The stock’s latest low price marks a significant point in its recent performance trajectory, underscoring persistent challenges in both near-term and long-term financial metrics. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Aro Granite Industries Ltd Stock Hits 52-Week Low at Rs.24
item.description: Aro Granite Industries Ltd has touched a new 52-week low of Rs.24 today, marking a significant decline in its stock price amid a broader market downturn and persistent financial headwinds. The stock has been on a downward trajectory, reflecting ongoing concerns about the company’s financial health and market positioning within the diversified consumer products sector. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Sensex and Nifty Slip Amid Broad Sector Weakness; Utilities Offer Bright Spot
item.description: Indian equity benchmarks ended lower on 12 Mar 2026, with the Sensex dropping 1.08% to close at 76,034.42 and the Nifty 50 declining 0.95% to 23,639.15. The market faced broad-based selling pressure, led by mega cap stocks, while sectoral performance was mixed with utilities gaining ground and the auto sector experiencing notable weakness. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Sees Mild Correction Amid Mixed Sectoral Trends
item.description: The mid-cap segment, as represented by the BSE MIDCAP 150 index, experienced a modest decline of 0.24% on 12 Mar 2026, extending a recent five-day downward trend with a cumulative loss of 1.72%. Despite this, select stocks within the segment demonstrated bullish momentum, underscoring a nuanced market environment marked by sectoral disparities and breadth challenges. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Sees Mild Correction Amid Mixed Sectoral Trends
item.description: The BSE Smallcap 250 index has experienced a modest decline of 0.32% today, extending a recent five-day downward trend with a cumulative loss of 1.11%. Despite this, select stocks within the segment have delivered notable returns, reflecting a nuanced market environment marked by mixed sectoral performances and a slightly negative breadth. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Faces Downward Pressure Amid Mixed Stock Performances
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, has experienced a notable downturn over recent sessions, with a five-day decline of 3.13% and a day-on-day drop of 0.85%. While heavyweight stocks such as Hindalco Industries and JSW Steel maintain mildly bullish to bullish stances, the broader market sentiment remains cautious amid a defensive tilt and a subdued advance-decline ratio. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Simplex Infrastructures Ltd Hits Intraday High with 8.22% Surge on 12 Mar 2026
item.description: Simplex Infrastructures Ltd recorded a robust intraday performance on 12 Mar 2026, surging 8.22% to touch a day’s high of Rs 191.5. This marks a significant rebound amid a broadly declining market, with the stock outperforming its sector and the Sensex by a wide margin. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Escorts Kubota Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 12 Mar 2026
item.description: Escorts Kubota Ltd experienced a notable intraday decline on 12 Mar 2026, touching a low of Rs 3,222.1, down 5.03% from the previous close. This underperformance came amid broader market weakness and sectoral pressures, with the stock falling more sharply than both its sector and the benchmark Sensex. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Sri Lakshmi Saraswathi Textiles (Arni) Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amidst Market Downturn
item.description: Sri Lakshmi Saraswathi Textiles (Arni) Ltd has touched a new 52-week low of Rs.24.3, marking a significant decline in its share price amid broader market pressures and company-specific factors. The stock’s performance today notably underperformed its sector, reflecting ongoing challenges within the garment and apparel industry segment. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Sancode Technologies Ltd Hits New 52-Week High at Rs.251.3
item.description: Sancode Technologies Ltd has surged to a new 52-week and all-time high of Rs.251.3, marking a significant milestone in its stock performance amid a challenging broader market environment. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Alphalogic Techsys Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.33.68
item.description: Alphalogic Techsys Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, has touched a new 52-week low of Rs.33.68 today, marking a significant decline amid broader market weakness and sector underperformance. Time: 2 hours ago
